data.title: Schneider Electric and AMD release first Helios platform reference design to accelerate AI Factory deployment
data.description: In a significant development, Schneider Electric and AMD have recently introduced the initial Helios platform reference design. This innovation aims to expedite the deployment of AI Factory solutions. The collaboration between the two tech giants is set to reshape the industry, with the Helios platform offering cutting-edge capabilities for artificial intelligence applications. The first design is projected to revolutionize the sector and is seen as a major step forward in enhancing efficiency and performance. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking partnership.

data.title: AHF at AIDS 2026 Conference: AIDS Isn't Over­—and Syphilis Is Surging
data.description: In Rio de Janeiro, the AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF), a leading organization in HIV and STI prevention and treatment, is actively participating in the 26th International AIDS Conference (AIDS 2026). The conference is taking place both in person and virtually from July 26-31 in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. At the event, AHF is focusing on highlighting the alarming increase in syphilis rates globally. They are emphasizing the critical need for regular syphilis screenings. This initiative aims to raise awareness about the importance of proactive healthcare measures in tackling the spread of STIs.AHF's presence at the conference underscores the urgent need to address the rising syphilis rates and promote preventive healthcare practices among the attendees.
Trump: I'm going over now to talk about the Iran war.

data.title: Garmin Pilot adds Mobile Clearance Delivery for streamlined IFR clearances
data.description: Today, Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) revealed a new feature in collaboration with the FAA and MITRE that enables users of Garmin Pilot to acquire and revoke IFR clearances directly within the app. This service, known as Mobile Clearance Delivery, is currently available at specified U.S. airports. This advancement signifies a leap in convenience and efficiency for pilots using Garmin Pilot, which boasts a significant user base. The inclusion of this feature paves the way for smoother IFR flight planning and execution, streamlining processes for a more seamless flying experience.

data.title: Robinhood CEO victim of hack promoting "VLAD" memecoin, hacker posted malicious contract address on X account.
data.description: A hacker allegedly gained control of the X account belonging to Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev in order to endorse a counterfeit "VLAD" memecoin, sharing a potentially harmful token contract address.

data.title: Infobell IT Solutions Announces Strategic Collaboration with AMD to Accelerate Advanced AI Innovation
data.description: A partnership has been forged between Infobell IT Solutions, a prominent provider of enterprise technology services, and AMD in San Francisco. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both companies as they come together to enhance their offerings in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Vultr Scales Next-Generation AI Infrastructure with AMD Helios Rackscale Solution Powered by AMD Instinct™ MI455X GPUs
data.description: In San Francisco, Vultr, the world's largest privately held cloud infrastructure company, revealed its pioneering move as one of the earliest cloud providers to introduce the latest AMD Instinct™ MI455X GPU and endorse the AMD Helios rackscale solution at AMD Advancing AI. Pre-orders for these offerings will be accessible in Q4, targeting customers seeking advanced capabilities for high-memory, rackscale-accelerated compute tasks such as training, inference, fine-tuning, agentic AI, and HPC. This step aligns with the increasing trend of customers transitioning from AI experimentation to implementation.

data.title: Liqid Unveils Massive Scale-Up AI Platform Powered by AMD Instinct™ MI350P GPUs
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado, Liqid®, a leading provider of software-defined memory and GPU pooling infrastructure, has unveiled a new partnership with AMD. This collaboration focuses on leveraging the AMD Instinct™ MI350P GPUs to create cutting-edge AI infrastructure solutions. By combining Liqid's GPU pooling technology with AMD's PCIe-based Instinct GPUs, enterprise and cloud clients can access scalable and efficient AI infrastructure solutions. This collaboration aims to provide customers with the ability to enhance their AI capabilities without the need to completely overhaul their existing data centers.
